text: What if I told you there's an ocean hidden beneath the ice of Europa? Europa, one of Jupiter's moons, shows signs of a subsurface saltwater ocean. This could mean it's a potential habitat for life—but we haven’t found any yet. Data from NASA's Galileo mission hinted at this ocean, with ice crust possibly hiding liquid water. If confirmed, Europa could transform our understanding of life beyond Earth. Want to explore more about the mysteries of our universe? Follow for more!
